title: More Potatoes for Aeronautics
description: This mod adds more shoooootable Potatoes and more to Aeronautics.
body:
More Potatoes for Aeronauts

If you have any ideas or bugs feel free to join my discord : ) 
 https://discord.gg/uX8AYspx8



An addon for Create: Aeronautics that adds 12 cannonball variants for the Potato Cannon — because potatoes are boring.

Ammo Types:

Copper Cannonball — Cheap and lightweight

Iron Cannonball — Explosive on impact

Gold Cannonball — Massive knockback

Diamond Cannonball — Heavy hitter

Netherite Cannonball — Explodes and ignites (fire-resistant)

Poison Cannonball — Leaves a toxic cloud

Wither Cannonball — Lingering wither cloud

Fire Cannonball — Sets targets ablaze

Ice Cannonball — Freezing slowness cloud

Smoke Cannonball — Blindness fog

Lightning Cannonball — Makes targets glow

Slime Cannonball — Sticky with heavy knockback

All cannonballs are fired from the Mounted Potato Cannon (or handheld). Effect cannonballs leave a lingering area-of-effect cloud on impact, like a lingering potion.

Craft them from basic materials — most are shapeless recipes combining an Iron Cannonball with an effect ingredient. Netherite follows the smithing table upgrade path.

Requires: Create 6.0.9+, NeoForge 21.1+, Minecraft 1.21.1
          Create Aeronautics
